overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an industrial urban district beneath elevated highways. The player character moves from shadowed underpasses into sunlit streets, passing pedestrians, construction sites, and neon signage before approaching a large corporate building entrance.

events.description: emerging from deep shadow under overpass into direct morning sunlight
passing a pedestrian walking in the same direction ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath the elevated highway, transitioning from shadow into sunlight

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the player in the same direction along the path

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with integrated lighting
large industrial facility with distinctive yellow and black hazard pattern facade
thick structural column supporting the overhead highway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a shadowed underpass beneath a massive elevated highway. The player walks forward, emerging into morning sunlight that illuminates a yellow industrial building on the right. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction along the asphalt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial pedestrian walkway with active construction

events.description: industrial smokestacks emitting steam and construction cranes become visible on the left
turning left to face the construction site and industrial area

agents.ego_description: walking forward while observing the industrial surroundings, then turning left to view the construction site

notable_agents.action: walking past the player in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall industrial chimneys emitting white steam against the blue sky
yellow construction cranes and scaffolding around an unfinished building
large cylindrical storage tanks in the industrial complex

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the overpass, the scene opens to reveal an active industrial zone with smokestacks and construction cranes on the left. The player turns to observe the construction site while pedestrians walk past. The elevated highway remains overhead to the right.

events.description: turning back to face forward along the walkway toward the digital billboard
approaching a large digital billboard displaying glitching colorful square patterns

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large digital billboard with glitching colorful patterns, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: large suspended digital screen displaying malfunctioning colorful square patterns in pink, blue, and yellow
tall street lamps with neon lighting along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player turns back to the main path and walks toward a prominent digital billboard displaying glitching colorful squares. The walkway remains beneath the elevated highway, with neon street lights lining the left side and moderate pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate industrial entrance with security fencing

events.description: approaching the KENDACHI building entrance with large illuminated corporate signage

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the KENDACHI industrial building entrance, passing through the security checkpoint area

entered.detail: large industrial building with prominent white illuminated 'KENDACHI' signage on the facade
chain link fence topped with barbed wire surrounding the facility

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the KENDACHI corporate building, identifiable by large illuminated signage. The player moves from under the overpass into open sunlight, passing security fencing with barbed wire. The environment shifts from the shared pedestrian walkway to a more restricted corporate entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed industrial underpass into the bright, restricted entrance of a corporate plaza. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, moving forward as the darkness gives way to morning sunlight that illuminates a yellow industrial building and sparse pedestrians. As the camera continues under the overpass, the scene opens to reveal an active industrial zone filled with smokestacks and construction cranes before turning back toward a digital billboard displaying glitching colorful squares. The path then leads past neon street lights and moderate pedestrian traffic, gradually shifting away from the shared walkway. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadow of the highway into open sunlight, passing barbed wire security fencing to approach the illuminated signage of the Kendachi corporate building.
